metadata.title: TimeLedger | Data-Driven Workforce Settlement
metadata.description: TimeLedger Workforce Time Cloud for labor outsourcing and manufacturing enterprises, covering attendance, work hours, reconciliation, and settlement in one closed loop.

hero.title: Use Data to Drive Workforce Settlement
hero.description: TimeLedger Workforce Time Cloud for labor outsourcing and manufacturing enterprises, enabling closed-loop management from attendance and work hours to reconciliation and settlement.

painPoints.title: Traditional workforce operations are slowing enterprises down
painPoints.description: Without structured workforce data management, scalable enterprise growth is not possible.

items.title: Chaotic work-hour statistics
items.description: Manual Excel aggregation leads to low efficiency and high error rates.

items.title: Long reconciliation cycles
items.description: Month-end reconciliation is time-consuming and repeatedly rechecked.

items.title: Outdated punch-in methods
items.description: Paper cards and legacy devices are vulnerable to buddy punching and cannot meet face-recognition-level attendance verification.

items.title: Complex multi-party collaboration
items.description: Client, labor vendor, and HR data remain fragmented.

items.title: Untraceable risk
items.description: Lack of audit logs makes compliance inspections difficult.

workflow.title: TimeLedger delivers a full workforce data loop
workflow.description: Attendance Capture → Time Calculation → Rule Engine → Billing → Audit Archive

steps.title: Attendance Data Integration
steps.detail: Connect to multiple attendance devices and systems with real-time punch data collection.

steps.title: Intelligent Time Engine
steps.detail: Support multi-shift rules and automatically calculate regular hours, overtime, and allowances.

steps.title: Automated Billing
steps.detail: Generate monthly settlement bills from actual hours for multi-client and multi-organization operations.

steps.title: End-to-End Audit Trace
steps.detail: Keep complete logs with export and compliance retention support.

capabilityMatrix.title: Enterprise Platform Capabilities
capabilityMatrix.description: Built on modern clean architecture for maintainability and extensibility.

rows.capability: Granular role and data access control

useCases.title: Applicable industries and scenarios
useCases.description: Designed for manufacturing, labor vendors, and project-based enterprises.

items.title: Manufacturing Enterprises
items.summary: Build standardized workforce data operations around production and workshop execution.

items.title: Labor Service Companies
items.summary: Improve settlement efficiency and workforce assignment transparency.

items.title: Project-driven Enterprises
items.summary: Map work hours directly to project cost governance.
bullets: Settle project costs by labor hours

screens.title: Clear data views for transparent management
screens.description: Key module interfaces can be configured to your business workflow.

items.title: Dashboard
items.caption: Track core operation metrics and settlement progress in one view.

items.title: Work-hour Statistics
items.caption: Aggregate by dimensions with anomaly detection and correction.

items.title: Attendance Device Management
items.caption: Unified onboarding and control of access, gate, and face-recognition devices for trusted real-time attendance data.

items.title: Billing Generation
items.caption: Auto-generate settlement bills with traceable verification.

items.title: Multi-organization Management
items.caption: Manage multi-company and multi-project permissions centrally.

security.title: Enterprise-grade security assurance
security.description: Data assets belong to the enterprise. The platform provides capability support only.
points: Data backup and disaster recovery support
On-premises and private cloud deployment support

reliability.title: Stable and reliable technical architecture
reliability.description: Technology messaging is aligned with business reliability, not buzzwords.
points: Containerized deployment with private delivery options

finalCta.title: Start building your workforce data system
finalCta.description: From process assessment to phased rollout, TimeLedger provides executable product and delivery plans.

positioning.positive: TimeLedger is built for: Workforce-data-driven time and settlement management.
